title: Shieldwall
description: Mod that makes shield a collision entity.
body:
This mod makes it so that entities can now collide with shield and get pushback a bit,
you can edit the amount of knockback along with horse stopping force and stagger by editing the shieldwall.toml in the config folder.
It makes so that when blocking with a shield entities cannot phase through each other.

This mod's newest version now supports modded shields like epic knights.

I made this mod so it runs independantly but i made it mainly for the Villager recruits mod do check it out as well :)
Feel free to dm me on discord- "amigokilo88" for any queries, suggestions or bugs.

Hope you enjoy this mod. If you like it maybe check out my other mods too <3
